title: philotheca langei
intro: Philotheca langei, a member of the Rutaceae family and a close relative of the citrus plants, is a flowering shrub native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Philotheca langei include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Philotheca langei can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
